title: stellaria longipes var. laeta
intro: Stellaria longipes var. laeta, also known as the long-spurred chickweed, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This perennial herb has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of long-spurred chickweed include its ability to reduce swelling and ease pain, making it a popular treatment for sprains, strains, and skin irritations. Long-spurred chickweed can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms of treatment.
